channel.title: Docs update: `wp-source` package improvements
channel.description:
We have [reviewed and updated](https://github.com/frontity/docs/pull/141) the `wp-source` package documentation page → [https://docs.frontity.org/api-reference-1/wordpress-source ](https://docs.frontity.org/api-reference-1/wordpress-source)
Now, there’s a more detailed explanation of the API in its methods and better examples of how to use these methods in a React component ( `useEffect` )
In that page, you can also find links to some videos where Frontity DevRel team talks about the `wp-source` package
* :tv: [Frontity DevRel Talks 2020-01 - wp-source & CSS In JS [1:36]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=e-_66W8pfdY&t=96s) * :tv: [Frontity DevRel Talks 2020-02 - Pagination example & wp-source (state & fetch) [17:53] ](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=eW5xZlpcqQk&t=1073s)

item.title: Docs update: `wp-source` package improvements
item.dc:creator: juanma
item.description:
We have reviewed and updated the wp-source package documentation page → https://docs.frontity.org/api-reference-1/wordpress-source

Now, there’s a more detailed explanation of the API in its methods and better examples of how to use these methods in a React component ( useEffect )

In that page, you can also find links to some videos where Frontity DevRel team talks about the wp-source package

  • Frontity DevRel Talks 2020-01 - wp-source & CSS In JS [1:36]
  • Frontity DevRel Talks 2020-02 - Pagination example & wp-source (state & fetch) [17:53]

Read full topic
